summary: P6 Runtime Readiness Features Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests pass. All 9 P6 API endpoints verified working. Frontend RuntimeCockpit page with 4 tabs (Cockpit, Why NOT READY?, 1-Click Actions, Narrow Rollout) renders correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails with error 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'. LIVE badge does not appear.
integration_issues.note: WebSocket streaming is optional enhancement - all other functionality works via REST API

action_items: WebSocket connection failing for cockpit real-time streaming - investigate socket.io configuration or ingress settings
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 P6 pytest tests pass (4 Readiness Scorer + 4 Safe Actions + 6 Rollout Framework + 1 API endpoint)
Readiness Score API returns score=55 with 2 issues and fix_order suggestions - working correctly
Safe Actions idempotent: retry-safe returns 'no_action' when nothing to retry, revalidate-mapping returns 'completed'
Suppress Noise correctly caps duration at 120 minutes max
Rollout state machine: INTERNAL phase active, gates evaluate to gate_passed=false (correct for test env)
Rollout advance correctly blocked: transitioned=false with 'Gate kontrolleri gecmedi' message

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 tabs render with correct data, 1-click actions work)

seed_data_creation: None - unit tests use mocking for DB calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: P6 Runtime Readiness complete. 15 unit tests pass. Features: (1) Readiness Scorer with scored breakdown (0-100), issues prioritized by severity, fix_order suggestions; (2) Safe Actions with 4 idempotent buttons (retry-safe, revalidate-mapping, suppress-noise, auto-heal); (3) Narrow Rollout Framework with 5 phases and automatic gate checks. WebSocket LIVE badge does not appear due to socket.io connection failure but all REST APIs work. Login uses data-testid='hotel-login-email'. Auth token key is 'access_token'.

test_classes: TestReadinessScorer (4 tests) - score structure, perfect score, hard_fail reduction, severity sorting
TestSafeActions (4 tests) - retry_safe no_action/completed, suppress_noise completed, 120min cap
TestRolloutFramework (6 tests) - default state, initialize, phase order, gate evaluation, transition blocked
TestAPIEndpoints (1 test) - all 9 API assertions in single httpx session

P6 API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/runtime/readiness-scor: PASS - returns score=55, is_ready=false, 2 issues, 2 fix_order items
P6 API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).POST /api/lockdown/runtime/actions/suppr: PASS - returns action_type=suppress_noise, status=completed, Turkish message
P6 API Endpoints Tested (9 endpoints).GET /api/lockdown/runtime/rollout/dashbo: PASS - returns phase_progress with 5 phases, gate_passed=false

elements: Flow Metrics (6 pills + Push Loop controls)
